title: Westland Organic Chicken Manure Pellets, 5 kg
features: Ideal for soil enrichment and improvement
Use for feeding all around the garden
description: Product Description Westland Organic chicken manure pellets is 100% manure processed naturally to preserve its unique benefit. Rich in Organic matter and all the nutrients your plants need. Natural slow-release of Organic nutrients which keeps your plants flourishing for longer. Directions Lawns: 150-200g per m² in April, with further applications in June and August. Borders with mixed shrubs, bulbs and perennials: 150-200g per m² worked into the soil in early April and again in July. Root crops: 125-150g per m² prior to sowing. Green leaf crops: 150-175g per m² prior to planting. Potatoes: 150-200g per m² worked into the soil prior to planting, with a second application in early July. Pots and containers: Work into the compost in early April and again in July, 100g for a 30cm pot, 200g for 60cm and 300g for 90cm. Fruit trees, shrubs and roses: 125-150g per m² worked into the soil in early April and again in July. If there is no rain within 3 days of application, water the area thoroughly. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin, eyes, and clothing. Wear protective clothing, gloves, and eye/face protection during handling. Do not eat, drink, or smoke when using this product. In case of accidental ingestion, seek medical advice and show the container or label. If inhaled, move to fresh air. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and out of reach of children and pets. Do not contaminate waterways, and dispose of unused product responsibly. Box Contains 1x Box of chicken manure pellets 5kg See more
